name: /standards-monitor records the last successful iteration timestamp to a state file
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources: []\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-monitor.sh" --watch --once --registry .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml --state .claude-tdd-pro/standards-monitor-state.json --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '"last_iteration_at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z"' .claude-tdd-pro/standards-monitor-state.json && echo ok 1>&2
